This next social networking traffic video we're looking at is a very popular on MySpace.com and as you can see only 75,195 videos have been uploaded to MySpace. It's getting bigger and bigger and bigger and it's still a very popular social networking site. If you look in the Alexa rankings it's ranked number 6 in the top 100 websites so it's very, very popular. It's still used by millions of people a day. You can browse, you can search, you can invite, you can have blogs, you can go to forums, you can create groups. There's so many things to do to actually create a video on the entire content of MySpace. You probably want to quite a few videos in a collection. The idea here is that a lot of people spend their day doing nothing else but spending time on MySpace. If you can get a very good profile set up where you've got friends that you're inviting to the site and you're talking to them and you're networking with them, you can just grow and grow and grow and grow and grow to the point of where even top recording artists and actors and all sorts of people have MySpace accounts because they know that they have already realized the power. Setting one up is straightforward. You go here, you go into the first page and if you look top right you see here it says sign up. You sign up to MySpace.com and you're going to start the process of joining. As you can see here you can create a custom profile, upload your pictures, you can send mail and instant messages, you can write blogs and it's free. Basically, once you get people into your friends network and you get a following, if you can start creating a blog or topic within your profile that's very well respected or a niche that people are very interested in, you can stand out as being an expert in that niche. Every time you then add a photo, a video or a blog or edit your profile, every single one of your friends will be notified.
